emails.subject: FW: Management Committee presentation - Any suggestions
emails.body: FW: Management Committee presentation Any suggestions Hi Michelle, Do you have any suggestions so that I can move forward in finalizing the data based on our discussion of having Jeanerette run the numbers?

emails.subject: RE: Management Committee presentation - Any suggestions
emails.body: Absolutely. In fact, I had planned to prepare a draft today and cover with you prior to giving anything to Kelly tomorrow. That's my normal mode of operation.

emails.subject: RE: Management Committee presentation - Any suggestions
